description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Heel: 2.5"Product DetailsBlunt toed sandal with a block heel, has forefoot and midfoot straps with decorative stitch detailPaded beige footbedTPR heel with a TPU outsole (that has floral patterns)Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
